---
title: "Regression Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
source("source.R")
```

## Load Data

```{r}
final_data <- readRDS("results/data_final_all_thetas.rds")
```

## Prepare Variables

```{r}
awareness_vars <- c("ai", "algorithms", "ml", "rec_sys", "targeted")
awareness_vars <- awareness_vars[awareness_vars %in% names(final_data)]

behavior_vars <- c("google_controls", "google_privacy", "facebook_privacy",
                   "online_advertising", "browser_incognito",
                   "platforms_avoiding", "platforms_settings")
behavior_vars <- behavior_vars[behavior_vars %in% names(final_data)]

final_data <- final_data %>%
  mutate(
    concern_num           = as.numeric(concern_privacy),
    country_code          = factor(country_code, levels = c("GB", "GER", "US")),
    across(all_of(awareness_vars), ~ as.numeric(.x == TRUE)),
    algorithmic_awareness = rowSums(across(all_of(awareness_vars)), na.rm = TRUE),
    across(all_of(behavior_vars),  ~ as.numeric(.x == TRUE)),
    privacy_behavior      = rowSums(across(all_of(behavior_vars)),  na.rm = TRUE),
    age_num               = as.numeric(age),
    gender_bin            = as.numeric(tolower(as.character(gender)) %in% c("female", "woman")),
    education_num         = as.numeric(education)
  )
```

## Regression Models

```{r}
# a) Unidimensional OLS: overall acceptance (1D theta)
m_overall <- lm(
  theta_grm ~ concern_num + algorithmic_awareness + privacy_behavior +
              country_code + age_num + gender_bin + education_num,
  data = final_data, na.action = na.omit
)
```

```{r}
# b) Multivariate OLS: all three dimensions jointly
# cbind() fits one equation per outcome with a shared predictor set
reg_data <- final_data %>%
  filter(complete.cases(theta_service, theta_information, theta_data,
                        concern_num, algorithmic_awareness, privacy_behavior,
                        country_code, age_num, gender_bin, education_num))

m_multi <- lm(
  cbind(theta_service, theta_information, theta_data) ~
    concern_num + algorithmic_awareness + privacy_behavior +
    country_code + age_num + gender_bin + education_num,
  data = reg_data
)
```

## Results

```{r}
cat("=== OVERALL (1D) ===\n")
print(summary(m_overall))

cat("\n=== SERVICE ===\n")
print(summary(m_multi)$"Response theta_service")

cat("\n=== INFORMATION ===\n")
print(summary(m_multi)$"Response theta_information")

cat("\n=== DATA ===\n")
print(summary(m_multi)$"Response theta_data")

cat("\n=== MANOVA (Pillai) ===\n")
print(summary(manova(m_multi), test = "Pillai"))
```

## Coefficient Table

```{r}
focal_terms <- c("concern_num", "algorithmic_awareness", "privacy_behavior",
                 "country_codeGER", "country_codeUS")

tidy_all <- bind_rows(
  tidy(m_overall) %>% mutate(outcome = "Overall (1D)"),
  tidy(m_multi)   %>% mutate(outcome = recode(response,
    "theta_service"     = "Service (3D)",
    "theta_information" = "Information (3D)",
    "theta_data"        = "Data (3D)"))
) %>%
  filter(term %in% focal_terms) %>%
  mutate(
    stars = case_when(
      p.value < .001 ~ "***", p.value < .01 ~ "**",
      p.value < .05  ~ "*",   TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    label = paste0(round(estimate, 3), stars)
  )
```

```{r}
# Wide format table
wide_table <- tidy_all %>%
  select(outcome, term, label) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = outcome, values_from = label)

print(wide_table)
write.csv(tidy_all, "results/regression_combined.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## Coefficient Plot

```{r}
plot_data <- tidy_all %>%
  filter(term %in% c("concern_num", "algorithmic_awareness", "privacy_behavior")) %>%
  mutate(
    term = recode(term,
      "concern_num"           = "Privacy Concern",
      "algorithmic_awareness" = "Algorithmic Awareness",
      "privacy_behavior"      = "Privacy Behavior"
    ),
    outcome = factor(outcome,
      levels = c("Overall (1D)", "Service (3D)", "Information (3D)", "Data (3D)"))
  )

p_reg <- ggplot(plot_data,
                aes(x = estimate, y = outcome, color = outcome,
                    alpha = p.value < 0.05)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
                     xmax = estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
                 height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  facet_wrap(~ term, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "Overall (1D)"     = unname(palette_thesis["slate"]),
    "Service (3D)"     = unname(palette_thesis["teal"]),
    "Information (3D)" = unname(palette_thesis["mauve"]),
    "Data (3D)"        = unname(palette_thesis["sand"])
  )) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.30),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "p < .05", "FALSE" = "n.s."), name = "") +
  labs(title   = "Regression Coefficients Across Acceptance Dimensions",
       caption = "Error bars = 95% CI. Faded = non-significant.",
       x = "Coefficient (\u03b2)", y = NULL, color = "Outcome") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_reg)
ggsave("results/plot_regression_coefficients.pdf", p_reg, width = 13, height = 6)
```

## R-squared

```{r}
r2_table <- data.frame(
  outcome = c("Overall (1D)", "Service (3D)", "Information (3D)", "Data (3D)"),
  r2      = c(
    summary(m_overall)$r.squared,
    summary(m_multi)$"Response theta_service"$r.squared,
    summary(m_multi)$"Response theta_information"$r.squared,
    summary(m_multi)$"Response theta_data"$r.squared
  )
)

print(r2_table)
write.csv(r2_table, "results/regression_r2.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## Save Full Coefficients

```{r}
bind_rows(
  tidy(m_overall) %>% mutate(outcome = "Overall (1D)"),
  tidy(m_multi)   %>% mutate(outcome = recode(response,
    "theta_service"     = "Service (3D)",
    "theta_information" = "Information (3D)",
    "theta_data"        = "Data (3D)"))
) %>% write.csv("results/regression_full_coefficients.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## OLS Assumption Checks

```{r}
# Diagnostic plots for 1D model
pdf("results/plot_ols_diagnostics_1D.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(m_overall)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
dev.off()

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(m_overall)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

```{r}
# Diagnostic plots for each 3D outcome
for (outcome in c("theta_service", "theta_information", "theta_data")) {
  formula <- as.formula(paste(outcome,
    "~ concern_num + algorithmic_awareness + privacy_behavior +
       country_code + age_num + gender_bin + education_num"))
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
  plot(lm(formula, data = reg_data), main = outcome)
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
}
```
